verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All five specialists correctly identified New Zealand as the primary candidate with high confidence, supported by strong visual evidence (signage, phone numbers, infrastructure). The tournament correctly synthesized this consensus to select New Zealand.
